signInFailedDescription: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
signInSuccessDesc: Welcome back! You have been successfully signed in.
resetInstructions: We've sent you an email with instructions to reset your password.
title: Title
invalidTokenDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
passwordMaxLength: Password must be no more than 100 characters
setupDescription: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app
verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
secretKeyDescription: Can't scan the QR code? Enter this key manually
enterCodeDescription: We've sent a verification code to your email
